name: Source Asset Weight is Medium
notes: Adjusts the relevance of events and flows if the source asset weight is medium.
conditions_text: when the source asset has a weight less than 7
when the source asset has a weight greater than 3
TD_list: APPLY Source Asset Weight is Medium on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the source asset has a weight less than 7
AND when the source asset has a weight greater than 3
